name: peerd preview
description: Browser-native AI agent harness with the decentralized web (dweb) preview enabled — local-first, BYOK, sovereign by construction. The dweb protocol is research-grade and may change.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https: wss://disks.webvm.io wss://bootstrap.peerd.ai http://localhost:11434
